name: GOLFTEC Studio City
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf training studio focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. They utilize advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture systems, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise feedback on swings. Sessions are conducted in private training bays equipped with simulator technology, offering a controlled environment for improvement. Pricing is structured around lesson packages and memberships, with options available for various skill levels from beginners to advanced players.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses advanced OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Offers personalized data-driven coaching plans tailored to individual goals
Provides a complete service from lessons and fitting to practice memberships
Features a comprehensive pro shop with a 10% discount on gear

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for club fitting and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted; however, the facility has a pro shop for gear and apparel.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies based on simulator use, but typical sessions range from 1-2 hours for focused practice or fitting.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for young golfers looking to improve their skills with professional coaching.
